Name: small_lesion_recall_boost
Title: Can targeted training choices improve small-lesion recall in dental detection?
Experiment: Compare the baseline detector against variants that emphasize small-object learning through safer resizing, sampling, or loss weighting choices. Measure whether recall improves on small or visually subtle dental findings without an unacceptable rise in false positives.

Name: confidence_aware_detection_filtering
Title: Do confidence-aware filtering rules improve clinical usability of dental detectors?
Experiment: Study whether post-hoc confidence filtering or simple score calibration can reduce false positives while preserving clinically important lesion recall. Compare default detector outputs against validation-tuned confidence rules and report both localization quality and operating-point behavior.
